timelines.notes: Fetched 2026-05-11. Aggregated across Al Jazeera's Biden-withdrawal / Harris-campaign coverage (per user instruction). User-provided URLs are heavily concentrated on July 21, 2024 (the withdrawal day) and early Aug 2024 (DNC, Harris policy speeches); supplemented with AJ's broader coverage to span the full subtopic arc. Contributing articles: https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/3/7/timeline-the-biden-administration-on-gaza-in-its-own-words (Mar 7 Gaza policy timeline — included as it directly documents the policy backdrop that became a major campaign liability for both Biden and Harris) ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/7/21/republicans-want-biden-to-resign-immediately-after-election-withdrawal ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/7/22/world-leaders-react-to-biden-dropping-out-of-us-presidential-race ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/7/22/kamala-harris-hails-joe-bidens-legacy-in-first-speech-since-he-quit-race ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/liveblog/2024/7/24/us-election-2024-live-joe-biden-address-nation ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/7/25/key-takeaways-from-bidens-oval-office-address-on-exiting-2024-race ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/8/can-kamala-harris-help-democrats-regain-lost-black-votes ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/14/biden-on-the-trail-will-us-president-help-or-hurt-harris-campaign ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/16/in-major-policy-speech-kamala-harris-promises-to-bring-down-costs ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/20/top-takeaways-from-day-one-of-the-2024-democratic-national-convention ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/9/2/biden-joins-harris-at-first-joint-election-campaign-stop-since-leaving-race ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/9/9/republican-led-probe-blames-biden-for-chaotic-afghanistan-withdrawal (read but not made into entry — peripheral to withdrawal/Harris-campaign focus) ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/11/5/trump-calls-harris-a-disaster-as-he-concludes-final-day-of-campaigning . Additional articles drawn from AJ's broader 2024 election coverage to anchor canonical campaign milestones (debate, Walz pick, DNC nomination acceptance, Trump-Harris debate): https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/6/28/cnn-presidential-debate-2024-biden-trump (Jun 27 debate, AJ published Jun 28 reporting) ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/6/kamala-harris-picks-tim-walz-as-running-mate ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/23/harris-formally-accepts-democratic-presidential-nomination ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/9/10/trump-harris-presidential-debate . Opinion pieces read for context only (no entries drawn per implicit news-over-opinion preference): https://www.aljazeera.com/opinions/2024/7/21/biden-is-out-but-american-plutocracy-carries-on ; https://www.aljazeera.com/opinions/2024/8/8/biden-vs-harris-on-the-middle-east-same-dance-different-steps . Politico URLs in user's list excluded as not in approved outlet set. Date approximations per rule 4: Jul 21, 2024 has three same-day entries reflecting genuinely distinct news developments (withdrawal announcement, Harris endorsement, Republican resignation demand); preserved as separate entries per rule. Jun 27, 2024 entry pegged to the debate date; AJ's reporting was published Jun 28 but the discrete event occurred Jun 27 (10pm Atlanta time). Aug 20, 2024 entry pegged to AJ's Day 1 takeaways article; the DNC opened Monday Aug 19 but AJ ran its takeaways analysis Aug 20. Aug 22, 2024 (Harris acceptance) is the well-established date of her acceptance speech on the convention's final night. Source disagreements: Biden's reasons for withdrawal — Biden's statement cited 'best interest of party and country'; CNN reporting later described internal three-day pressure campaign by party leaders; AJ entries report Biden's public framing per his statement. Harris's debate performance and post-debate polling consensus is disputed across outlets and not captured as an entry. Public figures named: Biden, Harris, Trump, Walz — all public officials. No private individuals named.

Fetched 2026-05-11. Aggregated across CNN's Biden-withdrawal / Harris-campaign coverage (per user instruction). Contributing articles: https://www.cnn.com/politics/live-news/election-2024-campaign-news-07-12-24 (Jul 12 liveblog — used for the mounting-pressure entry, since Democratic public calls for withdrawal peaked the week of Jul 12 with statements from Schumer, Jeffries, Pelosi) ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/07/21/politics/joe-biden-drops-out-election ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/07/21/politics/timeline-biden-dropping-out-of-race-dg (CNN's curated timeline of Biden's path to withdrawal — used as confirmation source for multiple entries) ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/07/21/politics/inside-bidens-exit-from-2024-race ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/07/21/politics/read-joe-bidens-statement-drops-out-election ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/07/22/us/5-things-to-know-for-july-22-biden-drops-out-harris-ascends-vp-speculation-trump-reaction-campaign-cash ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/07/24/politics/donors-kamala-harris-diverse ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/07/30/politics/kamala-harris-atlanta-rally ; https://www.cnn.com/interactive/2024/politics/presidential-candidates-dg/ (context reference for candidates — not a discrete-date article) ; https://www.cnn.com/interactive/2024/08/politics/kamala-harris-key-issues-dg/ (Aug interactive on Harris policy positions — not a discrete-date article) ; https://www.cnn.com/politics/live-news/trump-harris-election-09-05-24 ; https://www.cnn.com/politics/live-news/trump-harris-presidential-election-09-26-24 ; https://www.cnn.com/politics/live-news/trump-harris-election-10-11-24 ; https://www.cnn.com/politics/harris-2024-campaign-biden . Additional articles drawn from CNN's broader 2024 election coverage to anchor canonical campaign milestones (debate, Walz pick, DNC, Trump-Harris debate, Election Day): https://www.cnn.com/2024/06/28/politics/biden-trump-presidential-debate ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/08/06/politics/kamala-harris-tim-walz-running-mate ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/08/19/politics/dnc-night-one-biden-speech ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/08/22/politics/harris-dnc-acceptance-speech ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/09/10/politics/trump-harris-debate-philadelphia ; https://www.cnn.com/politics/live-news/election-night-2024-trump-harris . Politico URLs in user's list excluded as not in approved outlet set. Date approximations per rule 4: Jul 21, 2024 has three same-day entries (announcement, inside-look process, statement endorsement) — preserved as separate distinct news developments per rule. Jul 12, 2024 entry pegged to CNN liveblog of that day's developments in the broader 'should Biden withdraw' question (which gathered weight from Jul 8 to Jul 21); used as the mid-pressure-period anchor since multiple senior Democrats made public statements that week. Sep 5, 2024 entry pegged to CNN's live-news date for routine campaign tracking. Sep 26 and Oct 11, 2024 entries pegged to CNN live-news dates capturing closing-stretch campaign activity; these are not discrete-event entries but rather anchor CNN's continuous race-coverage publication dates and serve to span the gap between the Sep 10 debate and Nov 5 election. Source disagreements: Biden's debate performance (Jun 27) — CNN framed as 'halting' and triggering 'panic'; AJ framed more neutrally as triggering 'concerns'. Both characterizations preserved on respective timelines per rule. The post-debate three-week pressure campaign on Biden was framed by CNN's reporting (especially the Jul 21 'inside Biden's exit' piece) as a sustained Democratic-leader-led effort; Biden's public statements during that period maintained he would stay in the race until Jul 21. Public figures named: Biden, Harris, Trump, Walz — all public officials. No private individuals named.
